query:
SELECT u.id, u.email, u.subscriptionTier, t.accountId, t.isDemoAccount, t.demoBalance 
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tastytradeAccounts t ON u.id = t.userId AND t.isDemoAccount = 1
WHERE u.email = 'kenny@learnhowtoprosper.com';
